title: Accessible slider component with controlled and uncontrolled value handling
purpose: Provides a customizable slider input component that supports both controlled and uncontrolled usage patterns, with optional value display and accessibility features.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named Slider that accepts various props for configuration and styling, including support for controlled components via the value prop and uncontrolled behavior via internal state management.

steps.content: Generate a unique identifier for the slider element.
Initialize internal state for the slider value when not controlled externally.
Determine whether to use the controlled value or internal state value.
Calculate the percentage position of the slider thumb based on current value.
Define the change handler that updates internal state and calls the external onChange callback.
Render the label and value display section when either is enabled.
Render the hidden input field for form data collection.
Render the range input with styling and accessibility attributes.
Render the minimum and maximum value labels below the slider.
Early return if the slider is disabled.
Parse the new value from the input element.
Update the internal state with the new value.
Invoke the external onChange callback with the new value.
